title: Chapter 41: Usopp Leaves Syrup Village
main_description: Syrup Village reaches its emotional resolution. Kuro has been defeated, but the chapter focuses on Usopp’s farewell, Kaya’s gratitude, and the Straw Hats receiving the Going Merry before sailing onward.
key_events: Usopp prepares to leave the village behind.
Kaya and Merry help the Straw Hats continue their voyage.
The crew gains the Going Merry and moves toward the next stage of the journey.
